name: Hop Hop
description: Hop-Hop – Fun Jumping Game for Kids | Endless Arcade Looking for a dynamic endless runner for toddlers? Hop-Hop is a colorful, easy-to-play jumping game that kids ages 3+ will love. Tap to jump left or right, collect shiny coins, and escape the rising lava in this fast-paced arcade adventure! Unlock a whole collection of cute kawaii animal skins as you play. The action gets faster and more exciting with every jump, making it super dynamic. Why kids love Hop-Hop: -Simple one-tap controls – no reading required. -Lots of unlockable animal characters (not just cats!) -Endless, high-energy gameplay with bright graphics.
instructions: Tap the screen ndash Your animal jumps forward Tap left or right ndash Move left or right to avoid the rising lava and collect shiny coins Keep jumping ndash The longer you survive the faster the game gets Collect coins ndash Use them to unloc
